projects.name: veritas_os
projects.description: VERITAS OS is an auditable decision infrastructure for LLM agents. Each decision runs through a deterministic pipeline: Evidence → Critique → Debate → Plan → FUJI safety gate → ValueCore → TrustLog.  Designed to make AI decisions reviewable, traceable, and accountable inside real organizational workflows.
